properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let me be filled with kindness, and compassion for the one The one in whom You love and gave Your Son For humanity Increase my love

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Help me to love with open arms like You do A love that erases all the lines and sees the truth Oh that when they look in my eyes they would see You Even in just a smile, they would feel the Father's love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: 'Cause oh how You love us From the homeless to the famous and in between 'Cause You formed us, You made us carefully 'Cause in the end we're all your children

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So help me to love with open arms like You do A love that erases all the lines and sees the truth Oh that when they look in my eyes they would see You Even in just a smile they would feel the Father's love

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So let all my life tell of who You are And the wonder of Your never-ending love Oh, let all my life tell of who You are That You're wonderful and such a good Father

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh, let all my life tell of who You are And the wonder of Your never-ending love Oh, let all my life tell of who You are That You're wonderful and such a good Father

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh, You are wonderful and such a good Father So help me to love with open arms like You do A love that erases all the lines and sees the truth Oh that when they look in my eyes they would see You Even in just a smile they would feel the Father's love
